headline: Huntington Ingalls (HII) Shares Significantly Higher After Jim Cramer Said “It’s a Buy”
summary: Huntington Ingalls Industries, Inc. (NYSE:HII) is one of Jim Cramer’s Hottest Defense Technology Stock Picks. Huntington Ingalls Industries, Inc. (NYSE:HII) is the firm responsible for America’s ability to project power globally since it is the only company capable of manufacturing aircraft carriers. headline: 3 Reasons HII is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Huntington Ingalls has been on fire lately. In the past six months alone, the company’s stock price has rocketed 43.6%, reaching $400.25 per share. This run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.
